event: Farmers Stacking a Hayrick at Sunset in Rural Ireland
symbols: the massive haystack — the fruit of communal labor and the harvest gathered before nightfall
the dramatic sunset sky — the fleeting beauty of the day's end, streaked with orange, gold, and dark clouds
silhouetted workers on the stack — human figures dwarfed by the scale of the land and sky
the stone cottage in the background — simple dwelling rooted in the Irish landscape
description: A group of farmers work atop and around a large, dark haystack set against a vivid sunset sky streaked with orange, gold, and deep purple-blue clouds. Some figures stand on top of the stack, others climb a ladder propped against its side, and a few work at ground level. A small stone cottage sits to the right. The foreground shows green grass with yellow flowers. The entire scene is rendered in strong silhouette against the luminous sky, with Rockwell Kent's characteristic bold, stylized forms and dramatic contrast between the dark earth and blazing horizon.
